docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO PLAINTIFF BAUERSFELD, SCOTT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY BAUERSFELD, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-01-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $75.00 SERVED JUN-13-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-01-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-01-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SCOTT BAUERSFELD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS INC. IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANNE BATIK FILED BY DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-01-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAUERSFELD, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VERITAS INVESTMENTS INC. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,625.00, PLAINTIFF PROVIDED THE LANDLORD WITH FORWARDING ADDRESS & LANDLORD'S INSTRUCTIONS SPECIFICALLY INDICATED PLAINTIFF WILL RECEIVE A WRITTEN REPORT OF ANY DAMAGES TO HIS NEW ADDRESS. BUT LANDLORD NEVER MAILED ANYTHING TO PLAINTIFF AND INSTEAD REPORTED HIM TO COLLECTION AGENCY AFTER SENDING A FEW EMAILS TO HIS LAST KNOWN EMAIL ADDRESS W/O ANY ASSURANCES THAT PLAINTIFF RECEIVED THEM. PLAINTIFF NEVER RECEIVED THE EMAILS. LANDLORD MADE A CALL TO PLAINTIFF'S NUMBER & LEFT A VAGUE MESSAGE THAT PLAINTIFF DISMISSED AS A1 GENERATED MESSAGE SINCE HE HAD NOT RECEIVED ANY MESSAGES IN WRITING PRIOR TO THE CALL. PLAINTIFF HAS MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
